# Poulin Cooling A/C and Refrigeration

> Poulin Cooling A/C and Refrigeration is a licensed HVAC contractor serving Clearwater and Pinellas County, FL. We specialize in residential and commercial air conditioning repair, AC installation, heating repair, heating installation, commercial refrigeration, and indoor air quality services.

Location: Clearwater, FL  
Phone: (727) 424-2222  
Website: https://poulincooling.com  
Knowledge base: https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app

## Knowledge base articles

- [Air Conditioning Contractor](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/air-conditioning-contractor): An air conditioning contractor is a licensed professional or company that installs, repairs, and maintains air conditioning systems for residential and commercial properties.
- [Central Air Conditioning Systems](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/central-air-conditioning-systems): Central air conditioning systems are whole-home cooling systems that distribute conditioned air through ductwork to every room in a residential or commercial building.
- [Residential HVAC](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/residential-hvac): Residential HVAC is the integrated system of equipment and ductwork that controls heating, ventilation, and air conditioning inside a home.
- [Ductless Mini Split Systems](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/ductless-mini-split-systems): Ductless mini split systems are air conditioning systems with a separate outdoor condensing unit and one or more indoor air handling units connected by refrigerant lines, delivering zoned heating and cooling without ductwork.
- [Heat Pumps](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/heat-pumps): Heat pumps are HVAC systems that transfer heat between indoor and outdoor environments, providing both heating and cooling from a single unit.
- [Variable Refrigerant Flow](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/variable-refrigerant-flow): Variable refrigerant flow is an HVAC technology that modulates refrigerant delivery to multiple indoor zones from a single outdoor condensing unit.
- [Air Handlers](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/air-handlers): Air handlers are indoor HVAC units that circulate conditioned air throughout a building by housing the blower motor, air filter, and heat exchanger coil in a single cabinet.
- [Compressors](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/compressors): Compressors are the mechanical heart of every refrigeration and air conditioning system, increasing refrigerant gas pressure from the low-pressure suction side to the high-pressure discharge side to drive the entire cooling cycle.
- [Condenser Units](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/condenser-units): Condenser units are the outdoor components of an air conditioning system that expel heat absorbed from indoor air back into the outside environment.
- [Blower Motors](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/blower-motors): Blower motors are the electric motors that power the fan inside an HVAC system to circulate conditioned air through a building.
- [Airflow](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/airflow): Airflow is the movement of air through a system, characterized by volume, velocity, and pressure differential.
- [Ductwork](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/ductwork): Ductwork is a system of conduits that delivers and removes conditioned air throughout a building.
- [Duct Sealing](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/duct-sealing): Duct sealing is the process of applying sealant to HVAC ductwork to prevent conditioned air from escaping through gaps, cracks, and disconnected joints before it reaches living spaces.
- [Air Duct Cleaning](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/air-duct-cleaning): Air duct cleaning is the mechanical removal of dust, debris, and contaminants from an HVAC ductwork system.
- [Ventilation](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/ventilation): Ventilation is the intentional introduction and removal of air from a space, measured in air changes per hour (ACH), cubic feet per minute (CFM), and static pressure in inches of water column.
- [Humidity Control](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/humidity-control): Humidity control is the HVAC system feature that regulates indoor moisture levels within the 30 to 60% relative humidity range recommended for residential and commercial spaces.
- [Dehumidifier](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/dehumidifier): A dehumidifier is an air treatment appliance that removes excess moisture from indoor air by drawing humid air across a cold coil, condensing the water vapor, and collecting the extracted water in a tank.
- [Indoor Air Quality Solutions](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/indoor-air-quality-solutions): Indoor air quality solutions are systems and products designed to improve air quality within enclosed residential and commercial spaces.
- [Poor Indoor Air Quality](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/poor-indoor-air-quality): Poor indoor air quality is a measurable indoor environmental condition in which airborne pollutant concentrations exceed safe thresholds inside a building.
- [HEPA Filter](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/hepa-filter): A HEPA filter (High-Efficiency Particulate Air filter, known as a True HEPA filter) is a mechanical air filtration component designed to trap microscopic particles that pass through standard air filters.
- [UV Lights](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/uv-lights): UV lights (germicidal lamps or UV-C lamps) are ultraviolet lamps that emit germicidal light in the 200 to 280 nanometer wavelength range to disinfect air streams inside HVAC systems.
- [Air Filters](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/air-filters): Air filters are devices designed to remove particulate matter from an HVAC air stream, protecting both indoor air quality and mechanical components.
- [Dirty Air Filter](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/dirty-air-filter): A dirty air filter is a clogged or blocked filter media condition in which accumulated dust, debris, and airborne particles restrict airflow through an HVAC system.
- [Programmable Thermostat](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/programmable-thermostat): A programmable thermostat is a device that automatically adjusts HVAC system operation based on a pre-set schedule, eliminating the need for manual temperature changes throughout the day.
- [Thermostats](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/thermostats): Thermostats are devices that automatically regulate temperature by controlling HVAC systems across a range of -10°F to 120°F.
- [Cooling Efficiency](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/cooling-efficiency): Cooling efficiency is the measurable ratio of cooling output delivered by an air conditioning system relative to the energy consumed to produce it.
- [Energy Efficiency](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/energy-efficiency): Energy efficiency is the ratio of useful energy output to total energy input for a cooling or heating system.
- [SEER Rating](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/seer-rating): SEER rating is the numerical standard that measures how efficiently an air conditioner converts electrical energy into cooling output across an entire cooling season.
- [BTU](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/btu): BTU (British Thermal Unit) is the standard unit of heat energy used to measure the cooling and heating capacity of air conditioning systems.
- [Tonnage](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/tonnage): Tonnage is the unit of measurement that defines an air conditioning system's cooling capacity.
- [Load Calculation](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/load-calculation): Load calculation is the mathematical process of determining the exact cooling and heating capacity a building requires to maintain comfort.
- [Manual J](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/manual-j): Manual J is the ACCA standard for calculating residential heating and cooling loads on a room-by-room basis.
- [Coolant Leak](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/coolant-leak): A coolant leak is the unintended escape of refrigerant from an air conditioning system.
- [Frozen Evaporator Coil](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/frozen-evaporator-coil): A frozen evaporator coil is an HVAC system malfunction where ice forms on the evaporator coil surface, blocking airflow and preventing heat transfer.
- [High Energy Bills](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/high-energy-bills): High energy bills are a household expense in which monthly electricity or gas charges significantly exceed expected costs for the home's size and usage patterns.
- [Comfort](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/comfort): Comfort is a measurable physical state defined by three environmental conditions: indoor temperature between 68°F and 75°F, relative humidity between 40% and 60% RH, and particulate air quality at PM2.5 below 12 µg/m³.
- [Homeowners](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/homeowners): Homeowners are residential property owners who hold full purchasing authority over HVAC maintenance, repair, and replacement decisions for their properties.
- [Commercial Property Managers](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/commercial-property-managers): Commercial property managers are professionals who oversee the daily operations, maintenance, and financial performance of commercial buildings.
- [HVAC Licensing](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/hvac-licensing): HVAC licensing is the official authorization granted to individuals or businesses to perform heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration work within a state or local jurisdiction.
- [MERV Rating](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/merv-rating): MERV rating (Minimum Efficiency Reporting Value) is the standardized scale measuring how efficiently an air filter captures airborne particles before they pass through an HVAC system.
- [Zoning Systems](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/zoning-systems): Zoning systems divide a building into independently controlled temperature zones, allowing each area to receive precise heating or cooling without affecting the rest of the structure.
- [System Diagnostics](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/system-diagnostics): System diagnostics is the process of identifying faults within an AC system by measuring performance data, inspecting components, and analyzing results.
- [Preventative Maintenance](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/preventative-maintenance): Preventative maintenance is a scheduled set of actions performed on air conditioning and refrigeration systems to prevent equipment failure and extend operational lifespan.
- [AC Not Cooling](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/ac-not-cooling): AC not cooling is a condition where an air conditioning unit fails to lower indoor air temperature to the thermostat set point.
- [Uneven Cooling](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/uneven-cooling): Uneven cooling is a condition where indoor spaces experience inconsistent temperature distribution, producing measurable differentials greater than 3°F between rooms.
- [AC Breakdown](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/ac-breakdown): AC breakdown is a malfunction that prevents an air conditioning system from operating correctly, ranging in severity from partial performance degradation to complete system failure.
- [Emergency AC Repair](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/emergency-ac-repair): Emergency AC repair is a rapid-response service that restores air conditioning functionality after unexpected system breakdowns.
- [AC Unit Replacement](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/ac-unit-replacement): AC unit replacement is the process of removing an old air conditioning system and installing a new one, restoring full cooling functionality to a residential or commercial property.
- [Refrigerant](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/refrigerant): Refrigerant is a chemical compound that absorbs and releases heat inside a refrigeration or heat pump cycle, enabling air conditioning systems to cool indoor spaces.
- [Clogged Drain Lines](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/clogged-drain-lines): Clogged drain lines are an obstruction inside an air conditioning unit's condensate drainage system that prevents water from exiting the unit properly.
- [Electrical Malfunctions](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/electrical-malfunctions): Electrical malfunctions are abnormal states in an electrical system where voltage irregularities, current disruption patterns, or control circuit errors prevent normal operation.
- [Landlords](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/landlords): Landlords are property owners who rent residential or commercial spaces to tenants under legally binding lease agreements.
- [New Construction Builders](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/new-construction-builders): New construction builders are professionals responsible for constructing new residential or commercial properties from the ground up.
- [Building Codes](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/building-codes): Building codes are official regulations specifying minimum standards for constructed structures and systems, including mechanical, electrical, and HVAC installations.
- [HVAC System Energy Management](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/hvac-system-energy-management): HVAC system energy management is the systematic process of monitoring and controlling HVAC energy consumption to reduce waste and improve building performance.
- [NATE Certification](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/nate-certification): NATE certification is a nationally recognized credential that validates the technical competency of HVACR technicians across up to 9 specialty areas.
- [EPA Section 608 Certification](https://poulincoolingacandrefrigeration.mintlify.app/epa-section-608-certification): EPA Section 608 Certification is the federal credential required for any technician who purchases, handles, or recovers refrigerants in HVAC and refrigeration systems.
